mapper.select: SELECT c.*, g.grade_name FROM sys_class c LEFT JOIN sys_grade g ON c.grade_id = g.grade_id ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM sys_class WHERE grade_id = #{gradeId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC

SELECT c.*, g.grade_name FROM sys_class c LEFT JOIN sys_grade g ON c.grade_id = g.grade_id
AND c.class_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{className}, '%')
AND c.grade_id = #{gradeId}
ORDER BY c.sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_class (class_name, grade_id, teacher_name, sort_order, status) VALUES (#{className}, #{gradeId}, #{teacherName}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
